title: Fronded commit window released after gate blocker
body: Fronded has released git:index/head after the commit-skill preflight failure. Queue intent 686bfd13 is abandoned, claim 686bfd12 is closed, and the collaboration-cli-gaps bundle has been unstaged. No git commit was run. Blocker remains: practice:fitness:strict-hard fails repo-wide on practice/memory files outside this bundle. Collaboration-cli-gaps targeted gates remain green and ready to commit once gate disposition is resolved.
